'''bahotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabanca|tabanca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabanca|tabanca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bahotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæhetheth|bæhetheth]] || [[word:bæhethej|bæhethej]] || [[word:bæhethesh|bæhethesh]] || [[word:bæhethe|bæhethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahohothoth|bahohothoth]] || [[word:bahohothoj|bahohothoj]] || [[word:bahohothosh|bahohothosh]] || [[word:bahohotho|bahohotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahothoth|bahothoth]] || [[word:bahothoj|bahothoj]] || [[word:bahothosh|bahothosh]] || [[word:bahotho|bahotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahofthoth|bahofthoth]] || [[word:bahofthoj|bahofthoj]] || [[word:bahofthosh|bahofthosh]] || [[word:bahofthof|bahofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bahothotho|bahothotho]] || [[word:bahothojo|bahothojo]] || [[word:bahothosho|bahothosho]] || [[word:bahothoko|bahothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bahothoth|bahothoth]] || [[word:bahothoj|bahothoj]] || [[word:bahothosh|bahothosh]] || [[word:bahotho|bahotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bahothothol|bahothothol]] || [[word:bahothojol|bahothojol]] || [[word:bahothoshol|bahothoshol]] || [[word:bahothokol|bahothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bahothothotho|bahothothotho]] || [[word:bahothojojo|bahothojojo]] || [[word:bahothoshosho|bahothoshosho]] || [[word:bahothoko|bahothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bahothothon|bahothothon]] || [[word:bahothojon|bahothojon]] || [[word:bahothoshon|bahothoshon]] || [[word:bahothokon|bahothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bahothothoro|bahothothoro]] || [[word:bahothojoro|bahothojoro]] || [[word:bahothoshoro|bahothoshoro]] || [[word:bahothokoro|bahothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
